review_title: Lots of features, steep learning curve
author: Tim V.
pros: This software has solutions for anyone in the building service contractor or security contractor software space. The software is built on an older framework but is extremely powerful. It is invaluable for running our building service business. Their employees are a true joy with which to work.
cons: The software is built on an older framework that can be a challenge to get new ideas pushed into.

review_title: Great software to run my entire business
description: Overall, Winteam has helped me streamline my back office, while also controlling things in the field. It has saved me money by allowing me to in-house payroll and by preventing the timecard errors we used to have when our employees were filling out timecards by hand. The alert system allows me to know if a building is not being cleaned, so that one of my supervisors can handle the issue before the customer opens in the morning, so that we never have a client going without service, even if their regular cleaner can't get there.
author: Tracie B.
pros: I love that Winteam designed a software specifically for my industry. From estimates & scheduling to timekeeping, payroll and invoicing, and even benefits management tools, this software can handle every aspect of my commercial janitorial company.
cons: I would find it very helpful if all reports were able to be printed. Not only do I find it a bit difficult to design custom reports, but some things simply cannot be printed. Also, the accounting piece is not as simple as something like Quickbooks. I can really drill down into the nitty-gritty of every aspect of my company, but I need my accountant to help me do it!

author: Luz S.
pros: Customer Service was easy to connect with at all times.
cons: It was very difficult to use, too many problems constantly. They charged for everything including trainings constantly. WinTeam would take months to fix issues if they fix it at all. Not user friendly. Reports were bad and you are not able to pull reports of every field you enter data in.
author_profession: HR Manager and HR Compliance Manager

description: We started using Team when before we were using 3 or 4 different programs to conduct business and keep track administratively. We often had to enter data 2-3 times. We had spreadsheets that worked well enough but to was all a bit clumsy and overly redundant, not to mention prone to error. We’ve used Team for about 6 years now and now everything “talks” to each other- payroll integrates with work tickets, benefits are programmed in, we can track for bonus metrics without a separate system, etc. We can compare financial projections to actuals and have control of our P&Ls. We love it and keep learning more that we can do to make our business more efficient.
author: Leah S.
pros: We can use one software for everything and it all talks to each other. Also, we have been able to go from paper based to electronically based- completely! No more timesheets. They clock in with the phone. The list goes on!
cons: On the accounting side- everything we need is there but it’s a lot less automated than say quickbooks as the software as a whole is not an accounting software. Just takes some time to learn.

review_title: TEAM software is our best tool
description: TEAM support is awesome, they go above and beyond. TEAM is always listening to our ideas and making improvements. The software itself puts all of our data in one place and makes it easy to pull out key metrics to help us run the business. Labor hours actual vs. budget, overtime management, job profitability, and the list goes on and one. A huge number of custom data fields allow us to track what’s important to our team.
author: Dawn T.
pros: Full integration of field operations and back office accounting, HR, etc. Everything we need is in this one software engine. Integration to EHub allows our field manager and employees to have data and documents at their fingertips and all in one application.
cons: That it’s still Citrix-based but they are working on moving it.

review_title: WinTeam Gave Our Company The Ability To Scale & Integrate Departments
description: I really enjoy using the WinTeam system and the integration and efficiency we get from it. Customer support and account management is fantastic as well. Always there when you need them. Rolling out new features quickly is the only con I can think of and with their new management and ownership I think this will be changing soon.
author: Pat B.
pros: The integration it gives us. Having Finance, HR, Operations & Payroll reduces error significantly and increases efficiency dramatically. It has allowed our company to scale fast for our clients year over year.
cons: New features take a while to make it into production and there is a learning curve in terms of usability so training new team members can take some time.

description: I used it for years and never liked it, but it's the best you can get for security in the market it seems.
author: Mohna A.
pros: It works. It's got the features the security business needs to run. It does pull a nice range of reports.
cons: It looks like it's from the 1990's and seems very outdated. It's a little hard to use and doesn't communicate perfectly with ADP. It takes a lot of work to log onto as well.

description: We are happy and use as much as possible. The employee interface is very useful, eHub clock in/out, the Action Items are great and help is a lot to stay organized and on track with all client requests and concerns.
author: Rene B.
pros: It is a very comprehensive software, with everything included, from financial control, payroll, to front line information.
cons: Needs a lot more flexibility ehen usisng the sales tracking module.

description: I have a very good experience with WinTeam
author: Sabrina R.
pros: I love that it is user friendly. I love that the F1 on every screen. I also love the idea Portal. I love the fact that you implement changes based on customer Feedback
cons: That modules are not as integrated. It would be helpful if items like vender master files are share between, Payroll, AR and AP.

author: Josh G.
pros: Lots of features to accomplish most anything you could need to do.
cons: Can be complex and difficult to understand how to operate. However, support is great and very helpful!

description: My experience started out very bumpy, but has really smoothed out over the years. I know I still have some to learn that the system will do, but it is much better today than 6 years ago.
author: Melinda B.
pros: After we figured out the payroll benefits, it is great now. We had a very rough start on it but learned a lot in the process. Completing the billing and also the ability to email invoices automatically on creation is awesome. You just have to make very sure you do things exactly or it is a mess. I finally learned an easy way to reprint invoices just last week.. Auditing is a breeze in Winteam.. Very easy to trace things all the way through.
cons: Our training 6+ years ago was abysmal. We ended up having to muddle our way through and figure things out on our own for the first year or so. Then we were offered additional training, but had most of it conquered by then. This caused us to do a lot of double work and all.. I still do not like the Other Billing portion, it requires a lot of manual work. And I don't like the limited invoice customization available. I am still having to do some invoices manually in Excel. Invoice Entry can still use some modifications also.

author: Teresa H.
pros: The Payroll, A/P, and A/R Modules are great!
cons: I feel the notifications in TeamTime could be simplified, we have had issues with this since day one and still continue to have issues. Also, on the call review log it should attach the facility to the phone instead of just showing the phone number (example: 304-253-0800 TNCC). There should also be a report that could be printed daily that shows just facilities that were not clocked into at all for the previous night . Our former timekeeping software gave us all these features and in our industry that is a very important piece to making sure our clients are taken care of on a daily basis. It's more efficient to call a client first thing in the morning if a facility hasn't been cleaned rather them calling us because we weren't aware.

description: Good company that is constantly upgrading their product. A very complete coverage of business needs and great service.
author: Rene S.
pros: You can run almost every facet of your business in this program. They allow for one system to track business payroll, payables, receivables, and if you use it budgets, overhead, accounting reports, etc.
cons: Some of the features have a cost associated that we are not able to work into our budget. Some things you would think should be easy to do, like print invoices with payments received on them automatically is not an option.

description: The Sales department, especially my Account Executive has been exceptional. They treated our company as if we were a part of their family. They have always strive to make our work life easier by offering us products that make us more efficient. Their training teams have been wonderful and very patient with us in learning new facets of the software. We hope to engage more with E-hub but we have not been able to implement it as of yet.
author: William B.
pros: We really enjoy the platform especially the personnel scheduling- it allows us to get a grasp on our profit and loss for each facility we service. It allows us to compare our actual dollar per hour we charge out with what we pay our employees. Secondly, we are strong users of the work scheduler. The ability to ticket our work orders and to close them after has definitely helped our company to become more deficient and effective at servicing our clients.
cons: I can really only think of 3 cons- the inability for our work tickets to print in Alpha order. The second con would that there are not as many keyboard shortcuts as I would like. When I call into customer service for software support- it always feels like they are in a rush and not always happy to hear from their client.

description: WinTeam is essentially another member of our finance team. It comes to work with us every day. The customer support team is excellent and we have a voice in future product enhancement. This isn't software that you purchase and never hear from again. They are partners in helping to strengthen and build our business.
author: Sandy L.
pros: The job costing capabilities of WinTeam are very robust. Sorting and filtering for reports is only limited by your imagination. The employees at WinTeam are actively working to make their product better and the customer is uppermost in their mind.
cons: While there are product enhancements that would be helpful, there is no need to pick apart each module and give a wish list of changes here. I have used the software for 11 years and every year sees new innovation and product improvement.

description: Easy to use once you learn the flow
author: Jason H.
pros: Flow of operations, support from Omaha,
cons: Pop up when entering invoices- cannot open multiple reports at one time

author: Joshua R.
pros: Love the reporting and tracking capabilities. The most useful reports in my job are the job costing and hours variance reports.
cons: Cumbersome and often unintuitive to navigate. I know t has the capacity to deliver many useful metrics, but I feel I'm missing out due to an inability to run them or even know that they exist. (Customer support is awesome in helping overcome this though).

author: Melissa S.
pros: WinTeam is easy to use and is a great all in one software. The various security settings are great for setting up the appropriate access for users.
cons: The Citrix login is cumbersome. It is difficult when the system is updating and in comes down for hours. We have 24 dispatch center that gets interrupted when this happens.

review_title: Great program and looking forward to updates.
description: I like the many aspects of WinTeam but look forward to more modern changes and updates.
author: Cynthia N.
pros: At the Corporate Office we utilize this program daily. Our Admins in all regions utilize this daily, as well. WinTeam is used in almost all aspects of operations.
cons: Citrix printing take more time out our work than it should and wish this feature could be fixed. Equipment tracker needs to be improved and I have sent recommendations on how this could be better.

description: We are able to control employee payments and also making sure the clients are billed. All hours are accounted for. We were able to reduce overtime by monitoring the hours worked by the officers and how adding shift affected them and how we can change schedules. One of the best parts is being able to map the officers home and distance from a post and directions to get there.
author: Raymond Y.
pros: Connectivity of all departments between payroll, scheduling, operations. Being cloud based allows us to work from anywhere at anytime as well. Great customer service.
cons: Originally the fact that it was cloud based scared us, but we were wrong. What I wish would be better is that some aspects of the software prevent you from working on different screens at the same time.

description: Again this is used daily. It is used for pretty much everything I do for my job. One stop shop. :)
author: Kimberly B.
pros: I use so many functions with this product that it is hard to list everything I love. This is the product I use the most and everyday. This helps me see hours worked, process payroll, record deposits, print reports and also find eligible employees for health benefits. One program to do it all.
cons: There are times that WinTeam freezes. This is not helpful while in the middle of a batch of payroll checks or even putting in a deposit. Generally it takes about 5 minutes to reset itself.

description: It's a good system for capturing employee data. Would like to see a more robust report writer.
author: Josie M.
pros: It is user friendly and easy to move around in. Entering data is very simple. Onboarding new employees from Kwantek is a plus.
cons: Not history driven so any date can be used without reason. The benefits portal is not very user friendly and very hard to figure out. Doesn't have a way to fix data entered wrong. Reports are not easily produced within the system itself. Haven't experienced using the BI module yet.

description: Overall, I have found this to be a solid product and when help is needed the customer service is wonderful. Everyone has always been very kind and helpful. I appreciate that they listen to what their customers want and are continually improving their product.
author: Kara C.
pros: Having used this product since 2013 and have found it to be very good for easily accessing information when needed.
cons: I wish that the user interface was bigger when it comes to inputting information, I use a larger monitor just to see the what I am working on better.

description: The interlinking of workforce management, accounting and customer relations.
author: Jeffrey B.
pros: I was able to move from three independent software programs for workforce management, accounting and customer satisfaction that did not communicate with each other to WinTeam that does each of these and each area internally communicates with the other. This is a big WIN for my TEAM.
cons: Complicated to set up. It takes a lot of time to get the information data entry into the system.

review_title: Very good at solving quick issues, not always great with more complicated questions/issues
description: Overall, the customer service staff is very helpful and willing to sign-on with us to solve a problem quickly. The response, though, on some ongoing issues is not great - they communicate to us through emails that they are still looking into those issues, but we sometimes don't ever get a satisfactory/helpful answer or solution.
author: Belinda F.
pros: I can run reports and/or filters for almost any information that I need.
cons: Issues with vacation hours for rehires/returning team members - there's always a problem.
